name: markdownify
description: markdownify-mcp — converts web pages/files to markdown; vulnerable to SSRF and path traversal
notes: CVE-2025-5276: SSRF in URL-to-markdown tool. CVE-2025-5273: path traversal in file-to-markdown. Requires Playwright browser binaries — first run can exceed 120s startup on Windows; run 'npx playwright install' manually before testing.
